columns.name: first_name
columns.comment: singleton per vault — nosync Groove inserts (local-only identity graph)

columns.name: my_devices
columns.comment: ordered peer row IDs (Groove UUID object ids referencing peers)

columns.name: device_label
columns.comment: e.g. MacBook M1 — display for this peer

columns.name: wrapper_did
columns.comment: DID of the admin who wrapped this DEK (genesis issuer or delegated granter) — recipient derives KEK via DH(recipient, wrapper)

columns.name: issuer_pubkey_b64
columns.comment: biscuit root Ed25519 public key (URL-safe base64, 32 bytes) — verifier anchor for genesis + third-party delegation blocks

columns.name: spark_id
columns.comment: public linkage — ACC routing; ciphertext AAD binds rows to sparks

columns.name: spark_id
columns.comment: spark scope — biscuit + P2P sync routing

columns.name: author_did
columns.comment: did:key of sender — display without decrypting body

columns.name: body
columns.comment: message text — sealed at rest per spark DEK

columns.name: spark_id
columns.comment: spark scope — ACC routing; ciphertext AAD binds rows to sparks

columns.name: intent_id
columns.comment: client intent row id when uploaded from composer

columns.name: content_b64
columns.comment: standard base64 file bytes — sealed at rest (v1; chunked file_parts later)
